No own-site careers page found; third-party job boards (Indeed/Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter) show associate dentist openings across the group but not verified on the practice's own domain.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Michael Acierno, DDS is the named practice dentist (matches record entity 'MICHAEL A. ACIERNO, DDS PC'), joined by associates Dr. Kathleen Daly, DDS and Dr. Jenna Lerg, DDS.

Practice is Smile Brands DSO-affiliated: site's careers link points to careers.smilebrands.com and the site is hosted on Smile Brands' CMS (smilebrandscms.wpenginepowered.com); public reporting ties founder Dr. AJ/Michael Acierno's DecisionOne Dental Partners to Smile Brands' Midwest region. notes: SUCCESSOR/MISMATCH: record names 'Plaza Dental Group' at 3337 N Harlem Ave / (773) 481-2772, but that exact address+phone is occupied by a different, unrelated practice, 'Family Medical & Dental Health Center' (confirmed via directory fetch showing '3337 North Harlem Avenue Chicago, IL 60634' + '(773) 481-2772'). The real Plaza Dental Group (Dr. Vincent A. Gasparaitis, DDS) is a separate practice one address over at 3338 N Harlem Ave with a different phone (773) 637-8696. No own-site for Family Medical & Dental Health Center could be located (only aggregator/directory listings), so website_status is none_found despite the entity being identifiable. vendor_website_hint 'Familymedsupply.Com' does not resolve to either entity and appears stale/unrelated.
